archimate:ApplicationService.name: Anonymisation
archimate:ApplicationService.documentation:
Definition: An Anonymization Application Service refers to a software solution or service that enables the anonymization of sensitive or personally identifiable information (PII) within datasets. It applies techniques to transform or remove identifiable information while preserving the usability and integrity of the data. The purpose of the Anonymization Application Service is to protect privacy, comply with data protection regulations, and enable the secure use and sharing of data for analysis or research purposes.
Source: IEEE Software
Source reference: https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/8484865
LOST view: TVA-Privacy Enablers [Motivation]
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AnonymisationApplicationService
ABB name: egovera:AnonymisationApplicationService
EIRA concept: eira:ArchitectureBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2023-11-20
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AnonymisationApplicationService
Interoperability Layer: TechnicalApplication
Specialises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/AnonymisationServiceApplicationService

properties.value: An Anonymization Application Service refers to a software solution or service that enables the anonymization of sensitive or personally identifiable information (PII) within datasets. It applies techniques to transform or remove identifiable information while preserving the usability and integrity of the data. The purpose of the Anonymization Application Service is to protect privacy, comply with data protection regulations, and enable the secure use and sharing of data for analysis or research purposes.
